summary: Game Tile Pregame Blacked Out Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND the user is blacked out of a game on the schedule
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to a game tile that has a blackout pill that is not live yet
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team> at <home_team>, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Blacked Out, Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to hear more games. Move up to navigate to a new date."
